description: leboncoin.fr is a French online classifieds marketplace for buying, selling, housing, vehicles, jobs, and services. Its public website is consumer-facing, and no documented public developer API, GraphQL endpoint, MCP server, or CLI on leboncoin.fr was found.
summary: No public developer integration surfaces were found for leboncoin.fr; searches only surfaced the consumer marketplace, a status page mentioning an API without developer documentation, and third-party unofficial clients/scrapers.
